title: New app: Sundae for Monday - Turn your monday.com docs into public websites - no coding required!
excerpt:
We’re excited to announce our new app - Sundae for monday :shaved_ice: 
Turn your monday docs into full fledged websites to share KB articles, documentation, reports, meeting notes with customers and business partners. B…

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce our new app - Sundae for monday

Turn your monday docs into full fledged websites to share KB articles, documentation, reports, meeting notes with customers and business partners. Build help centers, wikis, blogs and other kinds of websites with a sleek, professional look.

image21268×652 223 KB

  • Turn monday into your content management system - Use monday to edit your docs, and use Sundae’s embedded app to transform them to web sites in just a few clicks.

  • One-click templates - Select from our ready-made templates for wikis, help centers, or blogs.

  • Fast sites - Extra fast load times that keep your visitors happy using CDNs + web and mobile optimized code.

  • Boost your SEO - Optimize your site for search engines: add titles, descriptions, and social cards to make your site stand out.

  • Use your own domain - Add a professional touch and gain credibility with SSL certificates.

screenshot1999×1250 299 KB

Please try out our free plan - we’d love to get your feedback.

You can view our docs here (yes, we created them with Sundae ) and if you’d like to schedule a demo with us, please use our calendly link.

We’d love to hear from you!

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Quick update - we’ve added full text search support for monday docs published in Sundae sites with help center or documentation web site types:

image2086×1262 212 KB

image2524×668 104 KB

posts.author: amit.webullar (Amit Greenberg)
posts.cookedHtml: Amazing!!! Love the idea, are there any plans to add more templates in the future?

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Amit,

We’ve just added support for publishing your own blog in Sundae, with post images, titles, descriptions and page-level SEO and social readiness!

If you have any requests for additional templates and site types, give us a shout here, in email or through the in-app feedback and we’ll see what we can do!

posts.author: Hilamarsh (Hila Marshanski)
posts.cookedHtml:
We created a new blog for Sundae using Sundae on monday.com🍧 It was so easy and even fun:) you gotta give it a try!

Our first blog post explains what Sundae is, what’s it good for, and how to get started!

blog.sundae.so

Publish sites from monday.com instantly—Sundae for monday is live!!

Post monday.com Docs as a sleek public website in minutes with Sundae! Select your templates and publish high-end websites fast, all from your monday dashboard.

Would love to hear your thoughts🙏

posts.author: maverick (Moty Michaely)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s awesome! Seems like marketing, customer success and other non-tech teams can now bypass the tech debt required to get a new blog, documentation or a successful landing page up and running! Well done!

posts.author: Lauraann (Laura-ann Burgess)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been using it to publish all our blog posts. It’s insanely easy and awesome! Love it!

posts.author: naftsen (naftsen)
posts.cookedHtml: It looks very easy to operate. I’ll give it a go.

posts.author: Hilamarsh (Hila Marshanski)
posts.cookedHtml:
In monday, your documents play a key role in improving your internal workflows. But how can you effortlessly share all this valuable information with the public?

We have the answer to that!

Learn how to easily leap from private to public documentation in monday using Sundae🍧

blog.sundae.so

How To Publish Monday Docs as Public Documentation

Revolutionize public documentation with monday.com & Sundae.so! Discover effortless, brand-aligned publishing directly from your monday workspace.

posts.author: Milana (Milana Tsyhanenko)
posts.cookedHtml: Loved it, thanks for that

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml: More Sundae news! RTL languages (Hebrew, Arabic, Urdu, Persian etc) now fully supported - just set your site language under [Settings] and off you go!

posts.author: Johnny.m (Johnny)
posts.cookedHtml: Finally. Was looking for a way to share our docs outside monday.

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
More Sundae news, just before the weekend:

  • You can now delete your site from within the settings tab.
  • Sundae’s now available with a 14 days trial and new pricing plans!
